name: zerogravitynky/zg-policy-notice
title: ZG Policy Notice
description: Two-card policy notice block — cancellation and consultation policies, fully editable.

card1Items.default:
Cancel within 24 hours of your appointment — $25 charge
No-show your scheduled appointment — $100 charge
Arrive 10+ minutes late — $25 charge and/or appointment rescheduled

card2Items.default:
Your first treatment plan consultation is complimentary
Additional consultations require a $50 deposit to schedule
Prepay your service at consultation — $50 fee applied to your service
